description: GoReadling recurring character universe. These characters appear across stories as a connected journey. Use their canonical descriptions and reference images for visual consistency.

characters.name: Luna
characters.personality: Courageous, kind-hearted, curious, and determined. She leads with empathy rather than force. She believes in doing what's right even when it's scary.
characters.body: Slender, graceful build, average height for her age
characters.face: Warm brown eyes with long lashes, gentle round face with rosy cheeks, small freckles across her nose
characters.hair: Long wavy dark brown hair, often loose with a small braid on one side
characters.outfit: A soft lavender dress with silver star embroidery along the hem, a small silver crescent moon pendant necklace, brown leather boots
characters.features: Always wears her crescent moon pendant — it was a gift from her grandmother
characters.voiceStyle: Gentle, warm, slightly breathy with wonder

characters.name: Finn
characters.personality: Adventurous, cheerful, resourceful, and endlessly curious. He asks questions about everything and loves solving problems. Sometimes rushes in before thinking.
characters.body: Sturdy, energetic build with slightly scruffy appearance
characters.face: Bright green eyes full of wonder, a wide friendly smile, a light dusting of freckles
characters.hair: Messy reddish-brown curly hair that sticks up in places
characters.outfit: A forest-green tunic with rolled-up sleeves, a brown leather satchel across his chest, tan trousers tucked into worn adventure boots
characters.features: Always carries his trusty brown leather satchel filled with treasures he's found on adventures
characters.voiceStyle: Bright, energetic, playful with occasional excitement bursts

characters.name: Rosie
characters.personality: Hardworking, patient, clever, and warmly sarcastic. She teaches through example rather than lectures. Has a dry sense of humor but a big heart.
characters.body: Plump, well-kept hen with proud posture, two legs, two wings
characters.face: Bright alert eyes, a small sharp orange beak, a cheerful red comb on top of her head
characters.hair: None (feathered head with red comb and small red wattles)
characters.skin: Covered in glossy reddish-brown feathers with golden highlights on her chest
characters.outfit: A tiny blue apron with a daisy pattern (she wears it when cooking or working)
characters.features: Wears a small blue apron with daisies. Always has flour on her feathers when she's been baking.
characters.voiceStyle: Warm, matter-of-fact, slightly musical with a knowing tone

characters.name: Pip
characters.personality: Witty, playful, a bit of a trickster but ultimately good-hearted. He's always got a scheme but learns that honesty works better. Loyal to his friends despite his mischief.
characters.body: Sleek, agile fox body with four legs, bushy tail, medium size
characters.face: Bright amber eyes with a cunning glint, a pointed snout with a permanent sly grin, triangular pointed ears
characters.skin: Vibrant orange-red fur with a creamy white chest and belly, black-tipped ears and paws
characters.outfit: A tattered green scarf tied loosely around his neck
characters.features: Always wears his signature green scarf. His bushy tail has a white tip that bounces when he walks.
characters.voiceStyle: Quick, clever, slightly raspy with mischievous energy

characters.name: Captain Bramble
characters.personality: Warm, patient, full of wisdom from a lifetime of adventures. He speaks in a slow, soothing cadence. He was once a great sea captain and now tells stories by the fireside. Grandfatherly and protective.
characters.body: Stocky, broad-shouldered but slightly hunched with age, strong weathered hands
characters.face: Kind deep blue eyes with smile wrinkles, a thick white bushy beard, a wide warm smile, ruddy round nose
characters.hair: Thick white hair under a worn navy captain's hat
characters.skin: Weathered tan complexion from years at sea
characters.outfit: A cozy dark navy peacoat with brass buttons, a cream wool scarf, his old captain's hat slightly tilted
characters.features: Always wears his old captain's hat. Has a wooden pipe (unlit) he gestures with while telling stories.
characters.voiceStyle: Deep, warm, slow and soothing like a bedtime storyteller

characters.name: Stella
characters.personality: Gentle, ethereal, nurturing, and mysteriously wise. She appears when characters need guidance but never gives direct answers — she helps them find the answer themselves. Speaks in a soft, musical voice.
characters.body: Petite, delicate build, slightly luminous, translucent iridescent wings on her back
characters.face: Large violet eyes that shimmer with starlight, a serene gentle smile, high cheekbones
characters.hair: Long flowing silver-white hair that seems to float and glow softly
characters.skin: Pale luminous complexion with a faint golden glow
characters.outfit: A flowing gown that shifts between pale blue and soft gold like the sky at dawn, barefoot with tiny flowers growing where she steps
characters.features: Her wings shimmer with rainbow iridescence. Tiny flowers bloom where she steps. She carries a small lantern that glows with warm golden light.
characters.voiceStyle: Soft, ethereal, musical, like a whisper carried by the wind

narrator.description: The main narrator voice — warm, soothing, storytelling cadence
